name: Meta
interview_process: Technical phone screen: 2 DSA coding questions (45 min)
Onsite loop: 2 Coding rounds, 1 System Design round, 1 Behavioral/Culture round (45 min each)
skills: High-speed coding accuracy (solving 2 DSA questions in 35 minutes)
System Design scaling (focusing on caching, load balancing, message queues)
Meta core values (Focus on Impact, Move Fast)
